questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: A husband was breathing forth his grievances. "It's all right if she wants her husband to be a bread-winner. But...... I. it's not fair if she expects to ask you for a raise, Sir." II. it's not fair if she wants him to be a bread-maker too."

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Manager: "All right, I'll ask my wife if I can give you one." II. "Doesn't she also tell you to do some hard work, Sinha?"

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Signature: "I applied for the post of secretary and the manager asked if my punctuation was good. I immediately told him that throughout my career I never......" I. I been late for work." II. I been bad at grammar."

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: The conductor asked the commuter for the ticket. The commuter produced the ticket which the conductor examined carefully and then said, I. "I asked you for a season ticket, not a seasoned ticket." II. "You have travelled farther than your ticket could take you, sir."

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: A husband was saying: "My wife has not come back yet. She's either kidnapped, hit by a motor car or is shopping. ......" I. I hope she's not been kidnapped.". II. I hope she's not shopping."

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: The speed of a jet flight is truly staggering. You can have breakfast in London, lunch in New York and...... I. dine with the airhostess in a Korean hotel. II. indigestion in Tokyo.

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Mansi asked her elder sister Manjul, "Why does a traffic light turn red, sister?" Manjul replied : .... I. "Why not? You'd blush too if you had to change in the middle of the street?" II. "Maybe it warns us of a possible accident by showing the colour of blood."

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: When the daughter was about to leave for the cocktail, her mother told her: "Have a good time at the party, daughter; and be a good girl." The daughter replied :..... I. "Make up your mind, Mother!" II. "Okay, I would be a good girl after the party, I promise."

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Gopu: "If you sell your watches at cost price, how can you make any profit?" Dipu: ...... I. "We make our profit by repairing them." II. "Ours is a long-term business strategy."
